case_title: LUZVUMINDA TALABIS VS. BRANDON REEVES, ESQ.

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON SC-105A:ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER. THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS:YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD ON DEC-09-10 AT 8:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 506. CHALLENGE TO VENUE WILL BE CONSIDERED AT TIME CURRENTLY SET FOR TRIAL. DEFENDANT MAY SUBMIT ALL HIS DOCUMENTS, AND NEED NOT APPEAR. IF VE NUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED, CASE WILL BE RESCHEDULED FOR TRIAL. - COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC. 9, 2010. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, NO EXHIBITS RETAINE BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC. 9, 2010 BY COMM. PAUL SALVIT, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT REEVES, ESQ., BRANDON

DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE GRANTED. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A NEW ACTION IN COUNTY OF APPROPRIATE VENUE. (506)
